summary: Data Scientist with 2+ years delivering end-to-end data solutions — automating workflows with Alteryx, building Generative AI and LLM applications in Python, and translating data into decisions through Tableau and Power BI.

experience.title: Data Scientist
responsibilities: Led end-to-end development of enterprise AI solutions using Azure AI and OpenAI, lifting customer-service capability.
Engineered Alteryx workflows that cut data-prep time by 30%+.
Shipped Power BI & Tableau dashboards tracking KPIs for stakeholders.
Built enterprise chatbots on Dialogflow CX with Gemini and OpenAI.
Implemented RAG on Azure OpenAI — 40% accuracy gain using internal docs.
Designed scalable FastAPI services and middleware for high-volume conversations.
Created an intelligent search system with Azure OpenAI for context-aware retrieval.
Supported the frontend team on several ReactJS projects.

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Used Alteryx to cleanse, transform and analyse customer call data, improving reporting quality.
Built Power BI dashboards on processed call data to surface performance and CSAT trends.
Analysed call transcripts with OpenAI Whisper and NLP to extract business insight.

projects.title: MCP Server Integration Platform
projects.description: End-to-end Model Context Protocol server connecting AI assistants to project-management, cloud and observability tools — plain-English prompts, cross-tool reasoning, concrete actions.

projects.title: AI Ticket Summarisation Service
projects.description: Gemini-powered summariser embedded in a customer-service portal — generates concise, keyword-tagged summaries and cut manual review time by ~40%.

projects.title: Incremental CDC Data Pipeline
projects.description: MySQL → AWS Glue → Redshift incremental ETL for a BI analytics warehouse. 99% less data movement via change-data-capture; 10–100× faster analytics.

projects.title: AI-Powered Customer Churn Predictor
projects.description: XGBoost-based risk model. Full-stack deployment with FastAPI backend and React frontend. 84.6% ROC AUC after advanced feature engineering and retune.

projects.title: RAG Chatbot Assistant
projects.description: Context-aware chatbot using Retrieval-Augmented Generation with OpenAI & Gemini — source-grounded answers, internal doc indexing via FAISS.

projects.title: Embedded BI Semantic Model
projects.description: Production-grade analytics dashboard with an enterprise semantic model — 15+ DAX measures grouped by Financial, KPI and Risk categories; authored via TMDL for maintainability at scale.

projects.title: AI Financial Advisor
projects.description: Platform for financial insights and AI-driven recommendations with interactive Plotly visualisations and a machine-learning recommendation layer.

projects.title: Sentiment Analysis Dashboard
projects.description: Streamlit-hosted live dashboard pulling news into NLP pipelines — sentiment, keyword extraction and visual summary in one view.
